title: echinocereus coccineus var. inermis
intro: Echinocereus coccineus var. inermis, also known as the stemless red hedgehog cactus or inermis red hedgehog, is a variety of cactus that belongs to the Echinocereus genus. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and glycosides. The health benefits of Echinocereus coccineus var. inermis include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate pain, as well as its potential to prevent the growth of certain microorganisms. Echinocereus coccineus var. inermis is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and has also been used in topical creams and salves to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
